name: Mustard (Overnight)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the vinegar and mustard together and let stand overnight.
2. The next day, beat the 2 eggs with the sugar.
3. Add to the vinegar-mustard mixture and cook over low heat, stirring until the mustard thickens to the consistency of mayonnaise.
4. Pour into jars, cool slightly, and refrigerate.
